2332760.name: Toilet Hero: Epstein Files
2332760.description:
Are you ready for amazing epic gaming chair adventure to find the truth behind the files? Oily up my son and come to the island! Select your detective to find the clues and use them to fight with giga evil epstein toilets and other entities made by Skibidi Soft Technolody corportation.

What the hell this game is even about bro?

Toilet hero: Epstein Files is roguelike survival where you must fight with giga huge amout of creeps. Kill them to fill your clue progress bar thats is basicly your gaming level them chouse clue (that's upgrade fr fr) and kill even more creeps.
Survive as long as you can while SkibidiSoft Technolody printing new L creatures.

This epic game contain:

  • 6 (7??) unique detectives

  • 50+ clues

  • ultimate gaming experience
2332760.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 保加利亚语, 丹麦语, 荷兰语, 希腊语, 匈牙利语, 日语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 简体中文, 乌克兰语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
